title: Prefer virtual threads for blocking tasks
description: Using virtual threads for tasks that involve heavy blocking operations improves scalability and resource efficiency. Platform threads are limited and can become a bottleneck when many threads are blocked, while virtual threads allow for a much larger number of concurrent blocking tasks without exhausting system resources.
recommendation: Refactor blocking operations to use virtual threads instead of platform threads whenever possible.

checks.message: Refactor blocking operations to use virtual threads instead of platform threads whenever possible.
